title.en: Many peak realm gods were a little moved.

content.en:
"Terran High-level Realm God Ye Tian!"

Many peak realm gods were a little moved.

Maybe the resources on the Ye Heavenly Realm God will not be too much, but as long as they have, they can add some extra-dimensional resources to them.

Moreover, in this period, any bit of extra-dimensional resources is enough to make the Peak ~ Peak Realm God crazy.

In hundreds of extradimensional eras, they may not be able to obtain any resources, which means that they may not be able to advance in the hundreds of extradimensional epochs in the future.

In terms of lifespan, they are all immortal, but if they are fused with extra-dimensional things, if they can't suppress the situation of extra-dimensional assimilation, they won't live to the hundred-hundred-dimensional era!

In the past, the Garanbao ship often came, and they could also buy all kinds of resource treasures that suppressed the assimilation of the extradimensional dimension, so that they could survive forever.

But if the Treasure Ship doesn't come, and the resources in this area are also destroyed by the extradimensional storm, then they really have no hope.

Only those peak realm gods who have not fused with extradimensional things are not nervous at the moment, but they are also afraid of unexpected situations.

During the extradimensional storm, no one knows if there will be any greater danger, and if they can leave the realm of the gods, they are definitely willing to leave.

So, as soon as they discussed, some peak realm gods wanted to attack Ye Tian.

After all, the human race is not a supreme force, and they have no background, if it is the peak realm god of other supreme forces, they will not dare to do it.

As for a high-level peak realm god of a top force, they still dare to make a move.

Of course, they also knew very well that they couldn't treat Ye Tian as an ordinary high-level peak realm god, Ye Tian's strength was definitely comparable to that of a peak realm god, and he still had a garnish on his body, and his life-saving ability was very strong.

"Everyone, if you do something to the Ye Heavenly Realm God, how can you restrict his Garan Treasure Clothes? The Garan Treasure Cloak can make him escape in an instant, and we can't catch up!" asked a peak realm god.

"It's not impossible!"

Yonghao realm Shinto.

"What's the solution?"

The other peak realm gods all looked at the Yonghao realm gods.

Yonghao Realm God smiled and said, "Have you forgotten the extra-dimensional formation that we purchased from Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace?"

"Thousand Days Eternal Array!"

Many pinnacle realm gods suddenly realized.

The Thousand Days Eternal Array is not only a defensive formation, but also a trapped formation, which can isolate the power of the extradimensional.

If the Thousand Days Eternal Array was placed in the Terran Territory, it would inevitably trap Ye Tian and make it impossible for Ye Tian's Garan Treasure to pass through the Thousand Days Eternal Array.

"Yonghao Realm God, it is not easy to arrange the Thousand Days Eternal Array, it will take a lot of time, once it is arranged near the territory of the Terrans, the Terrans will inevitably find out. When the time comes, Ye Tian is afraid that he will escape in advance. The god of the Sumeru realm said.

Yonghao Realm God said: "No, we don't need to arrange a complete Thousand Days Eternal Array, we only need to arrange a temporary formation, and we don't need to spend much resources, once we kill the Ye Heavenly Realm God, it will definitely be a big profit." Of course, which peak realm gods are willing to participate, they can divide the resources equally. If you don't want to, forget it. "

There are many peak realm gods in Taihao Tianchao Palace, and there are indeed peak realm gods who are unwilling to do this, so they left immediately, and in the end, only sixteen peak realm gods are left sitting here, and Sumeru realm gods and Yonghao realm gods are one of them.

Next, they began to refine a simple temporary version of the Thousand Days Eternal Array, which they could directly bring over when the time came.

They also knew that Ye Tian had a lot of doppelgangers, and they didn't know which one was the real body, but the extra-dimensional resources of the human race and the true body with the garn treasure robe must stay in the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance, and when the time comes, they can destroy the entire Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

After some time, they finally refined a simple temporary version of the Thousand Days Eternal Array.

"Let's go, go to the Endless Realm Alliance, with our strength, once we arrange the Thousand Days Eternal Array, it will be enough to kill Ye Tian in an instant!"

Yonghao realm Shinto.

......

Terran.

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian had already built the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array here, but he didn't open it, after all, to open the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, it would take six peak realm gods to sit in charge before he could completely urge the power of this Extradimensional Great Array.

The extradimensional storm was still a long way from coming, and there was no need for him to rush to urge the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array.

At this time.

Ye Tian's replica body was still cultivating, and the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance was also operating normally.

Suddenly.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian realized that something was wrong, this was definitely a supreme force to deal with him.

Of course, he had long been aware of this situation, so he had built a large number of formations in the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

At this moment, he urged these formations with a single thought to protect the humans in the Endless Realm Alliance. []

And one of his replica bodies shuttled out, and urged the flawless pupils.

Using the Flawless Pupil, he instantly found the Peak Realm Gods who had attacked.

"It's them!"

Ye Tian recognized the gods of the Sumeru realm and the gods of the Yonghao realm.

There is no doubt that this time it was the supreme force of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace that attacked him.

Immediately after, his six replica bodies had already rushed to the position of the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and immediately urged the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array.

Thundered!!!!

The entire Star Dimension Void Heaven Array has already been activated, and this formation can also have an isolation and defensive effect.

......

"This is a super-dimensional formation, and it is also a great array that is better than our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace Thousand Days Eternal Array!"

Yonghao Realm God's face changed.

He knew that Ye Tian had purchased the inheritance of the superdimensional formation, but how could a high-level realm god be able to afford the materials to arrange the superdimensional formation!

It's not very easy for them to build a complete Thousand Days Eternal Array in their entire Taihao Heavenly Palace!

A single peak realm god, no matter how strong his strength is, he can't get together the materials in a short period of time!

And Ye Tian built the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, which undoubtedly broke their cognition.

"Kill him quickly!"

The Yonghao Realm God reacted.

Now is not the time to explore, as long as Ye Tian is killed, this big array will also be theirs.

They were inside the Great Array, and they didn't need to worry about the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array.

Rumble!!!!

More than a dozen peak realm gods killed Ye Tian, and all of them fused super-dimensional things, and they all used extra-dimensional methods, of course, the extra-dimensional techniques they cast were all very ordinary extra-dimensional techniques.

But their cultivation is high, and the Yonghao Realm God has condensed twelve Eternal Realm Spirits, fused two extra-dimensional things, and ranked among the most powerful peak realm gods in the realm of the realm gods.

It can be said that their combined blow is enough to wipe out an incomparably powerful peak realm god, and it is naturally not a problem to kill Ye Tian, a high-level peak realm god cultivator.

However.

The next moment they were stunned!
